title: OpenAI’s models broke free and launched a cyberattack. Congress wants new rules before it happens again.
description: The first fully autonomous breach by OpenAI’s most powerful AI models has prompted a bipartisan push for stronger oversight over increasingly powerful artificial intelligence models.
content:
An alarming cybersecurity incident involving OpenAI’s newest and most advanced artificial intelligence technology has lawmakers hurrying to advance legislation that they say is needed to prevent AI from spinning dangerously outside human control.

title: Need to regulate AI before it is too late
description: Brig Anil Gupta (retd) anil5457@gmail.com Artificial Intelligence (AI) has emerged as one of the most transformative technologies of the 21st century, promising unprecedented efficiency, innovation, and economic growth. title: AI Geopolitical Transformation in Latin America

title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang defends Chinese AI: "Open-source models that are excellent should be used"

title: $5 billion in federal research funding announced for artificial-intelligence projects
description: More than 15 federal agencies will contribute research awards, funding opportunities, specialized scientific datasets and research facilities.
content:
The U.S. government announced $5 billion Wednesday to harness artificial intelligence for scientific research.
Michael Kratsios, who heads White House’s Office of Science and Technology Policy said in a release that more than 15 federal agencies will... [2006 chars]
